# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.

Prevent edge computing security.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import { get } from '@vercel/edge-config';

interface EdgeConfigData {
  API_KEY?: string;
  DB_URL?: string;
  FEATURE_FLAGS?: {
    enableNewUI?: boolean;
    enableBetaFeatures?: boolean;
    enableAnalytics?: boolean;
  };
  RATE_LIMIT?: {
    maxRequests?: number;
    windowMs?: number;
  };
}

const DEFAULT_CONFIG = {
  API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
  FEATURE_FLAGS: {
    enableNewUI: false,
    enableBetaFeatures: false,
    enableAnalytics: true,
  },
  RATE_LIMIT: {
    maxRequests: 100,
    windowMs: 60000,
  },
};

const SENSITIVE_KEYS = ['API_KEY', 'DB_URL', 'password', 'secret', 'token'];

function sanitizeValue(key: string, value: any): any {
  const lowerKey = key.toLowerCase();
  if (SENSITIVE_KEYS.some(sensitive => lowerKey.includes(sensitive.toLowerCase()))) {
    if (typeof value === 'string') {
      return '***REDACTED***';
    }
  }
  return value;
}

function sanitizeConfig(config: any): any {
  const sanitized: any = {};
  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(config)) {
    if (typeof value === 'object' && value !== null && !Array.isArray(value)) {
      sanitized[key] = sanitizeConfig(value);
    } else {
      sanitized[key] = sanitizeValue(key, value);
    }
  }
  return sanitized;
}

function validateConfig(config: EdgeConfigData): boolean {
  if (config.API_KEY && typeof config.API_KEY !== 'string') {
    return false;
  }
  if (config.DB_URL && typeof config.DB_URL !== 'string') {
    return false;
  }
  if (config.DB_URL && !config.DB_URL.startsWith('postgresql://') && !config.DB_URL.startsWith('mysql://')) {
    return false;
  }
  return true;
}

async function getEdgeConfig(): Promise<EdgeConfigData> {
  try {
    if (!process.env.EDGE_CONFIG) {
      console.warn('EDGE_CONFIG not configured, using defaults');
      return DEFAULT_CONFIG;
    }

    const apiKey = await get<string>('API_KEY');
    const dbUrl = await get<string>('DB_URL');
    const featureFlags = await get<EdgeConfigData['FEATURE_FLAGS']>('FEATURE_FLAGS');
    const rateLimit = await get<EdgeConfigData['RATE_LIMIT']>('RATE_LIMIT');

    const config: EdgeConfigData = {
      API_KEY: apiKey || DEFAULT_CONFIG.API_KEY,
      DB_URL: dbUrl || DEFAULT_CONFIG.DB_URL,
      FEATURE_FLAGS: featureFlags || DEFAULT_CONFIG.FEATURE_FLAGS,
      RATE_LIMIT: rateLimit || DEFAULT_CONFIG.RATE_LIMIT,
    };

    if (!validateConfig(config)) {
      console.error('Invalid configuration detected, using defaults');
      return DEFAULT_CONFIG;
    }

    return config;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error reading Edge Config:', error);
    return DEFAULT_CONFIG;
  }
}

function isValidOrigin(origin: string | null): boolean {
  if (!origin) return false;
  const allowedOrigins = [
    'https://yourdomain.com',
    'https://www.yourdomain.com',
  ];
  return allowedOrigins.includes(origin);
}

export default async function handler(req: NextRequest) {
  const origin = req.headers.get('origin');
  const userAgent = req.headers.get('user-agent') || '';
  const ip = req.headers.get('x-forwarded-for') || req.headers.get('x-real-ip') || 'unknown';

  if (userAgent.toLowerCase().includes('bot') || userAgent.toLowerCase().includes('crawler')) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Access denied' },
      { status: 403 }
    );
  }

  const config = await getEdgeConfig();

  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const action = url.searchParams.get('action');

  if (action === 'health') {
    return NextResponse.json({
      status: 'healthy',
      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      edgeConfigEnabled: !!process.env.EDGE_CONFIG,
    });
  }

  if (action === 'config') {
    const authHeader = req.headers.get('authorization');
    if (!authHeader || !authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Unauthorized' },
        { status: 401 }
      );
    }

    const sanitizedConfig = sanitizeConfig(config);

    return NextResponse.json({
      config: sanitizedConfig,
      source: process.env.EDGE_CONFIG ? 'edge-config' : 'defaults',
      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
    });
  }

  if (action === 'feature') {
    const featureName = url.searchParams.get('name');
    if (!featureName) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Feature name required' },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    const featureFlags = config.FEATURE_FLAGS || DEFAULT_CONFIG.FEATURE_FLAGS;
    const isEnabled = featureFlags[featureName as keyof typeof featureFlags] || false;

    return NextResponse.json({
      feature: featureName,
      enabled: isEnabled,
      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
    });
  }

  return NextResponse.json({
    message: 'Edge Function with Edge Config',
    availableActions: ['health', 'config', 'feature'],
    usage: {
      health: '?action=health',
      config: '?action=config (requires Authorization header)',
      feature: '?action=feature&name=enableNewUI',
    },
    edgeConfigStatus: process.env.EDGE_CONFIG ? 'configured' : 'using-defaults',
  });
}

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};
